name: open
full_help:
Topic                 Description
open_bd_design        This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features ipintegrator'.
open_checkpoint       Open a design checkpoint in a new project
open_example_project  Open the example project for the indicated IP
open_hw               This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
open_hw_manager       This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
open_hw_platform      Open the Xilinx Shell Archive
open_hw_target        This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
open_io_design        Open an IO design
open_project          Open a Vivado project file (.xpr)
open_report           Open report from .rpx file
open_run              Open a run into a netlist or implementation design
open_saif             This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
open_vcd              This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
open_wave_config      This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
open_wave_database    This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.

For help on an individual topic, type 'help <topic>'. For example:
% help create_project
